overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player character navigates through urban plazas, beneath elevated highways, across illuminated intersections, and up to elevated walkways, surrounded by holographic advertisements, futuristic architecture, and sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an open plaza surrounded by towering holographic advertisements and neon signage

entered.detail: large floating holographic display of a woman in a blue dress
small blue shop structure with illuminated windows and signage
bright pink neon signs on building facades
tall stack of digital screens displaying yellow content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza illuminated by vibrant neon lights and massive holographic advertisements. The player walks forward on a marked crosswalk, passing a blue food kiosk on the right while futuristic glass buildings rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway with red neon lighting

events.description: moves from open plaza into the covered area beneath a massive concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under a massive overpass structure illuminated by red neon underglow

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure with thick support columns
red neon light strips illuminating the underside of the overpass
white concrete staircase ascending to the upper level on the right side
tall vertical digital billboards mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-enclosed space beneath a massive concrete overpass, bathed in red neon light. The player continues walking along the sidewalk as cars pass by on the street to the left, while vertical advertisements line the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with marked crosswalk

events.description: begins crossing the street on a yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians
completes crossing and continues along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing a wide street with yellow crosswalk markings alongside other pedestrians, then continuing along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall pole with illuminated pedestrian crossing signal
ground floor commercial establishments with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass area, the player crosses a wide city street marked with bold yellow crosswalk lines. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction while vehicles pass by, and the scene opens up to show street-level shops and traffic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairwell leading to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending a concrete staircase to an upper level
exits the stairwell onto an elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking up a long concrete staircase with metal railings, transitioning from street level to an elevated walkway

entered.detail: long flight of concrete stairs with metal handrails on both sides
smooth concrete walls enclosing the stairwell
illuminated vending machines at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the street level and enters a narrow, enclosed concrete stairwell. Ascending the stairs, the environment becomes dimly lit with artificial lighting until reaching the top where vending machines and the exit to an elevated walkway become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: emerges from stairwell onto an elevated walkway with views of the surrounding cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated pedestrian bridge with glass railings, overlooking the neon-lit city below

entered.detail: glass and metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway
illuminated sign for El Dorado Pawn Shop on the right wall
large cylindrical building with circular neon lighting and multiple levels
massive floating holographic advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated pedestrian walkway, the player is greeted with expansive views of the futuristic cityscape. The walkway features glass railings and overlooks the streets below, while a distinctive circular building with elaborate neon lighting dominates the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit urban plaza up to a high-altitude pedestrian walkway overlooking the metropolis. It begins by moving across a marked crosswalk past a blue food kiosk and towering glass buildings, before transitioning into the red-hued shadows beneath a massive concrete overpass. As the camera exits the covered area, the scene opens back up onto a wide city street with bold yellow crosswalks and passing traffic, eventually turning away from the road to enter a dimly lit concrete stairwell. The ascent through the artificial light of the stairs leads directly to an elevated walkway, where the environment finally expands into a panoramic vista dominated by a circular, neon-lit building and the sprawling cityscape below.
